name: local-news-plugin
description: Automates weekly local news research for Clark County, NV. Researches Government/Development, Restaurant/Business, and School Board news across 10 sub-agents. Ranks stories by viral potential, produces green-screen video transcripts with CTAs, 2400-word blog articles with images and NewsArticle schema, Reddit posts for r/VegasRealtor, Instagram captions, YouTube descriptions, and a compiled story spreadsheet.
